# Systematic Debugging

A structured four-phase approach to root cause analysis.

## Phase 1: Reproduce

Reliably reproduce the issue before any investigation.

## Phase 2: Isolate

Narrow down the scope to the smallest failing case.

## Phase 3: Understand

Read relevant code and understand the expected vs actual behavior.

## Phase 4: Fix and Verify

Apply the fix and confirm the issue is resolved without regression.
